prompt: Which vulnerability is most likely present in this code?

options.text: Sensitive Cookie with Improper SameSite Attribute

explanation: The `session` cookie is created without the Secure flag, so the browser will send it over unencrypted HTTP where a network attacker can capture it — Sensitive Cookie Without Secure Flag (CWE-614). Note HttpOnly IS set here, so 'without HttpOnly' is wrong. Fix: set Secure so the cookie is only sent over HTTPS.
